Ccz_inequivalent_representatives_from_the_known_families¶

The following functions generate lists of CCZ-inequivalent representatives from all currently known infinite families over GF(2^n) with n in the range from 6 to 11.

  1function listAPNRepresentatives6()
  2     n := 6;
  3     FF<p> := GF(2^n);
  4     P<x> := PolynomialRing(FF);
  5
  6     G6 := [
  7             x^3,
  8             x^6 + x^9 + p^7*x^48,
  9             p*x^3 + p^4*x^24 + x^17
 10     ];
 11
 12     return G6;
 13end function;
 14
 15.. code-block:: text
 16:linenos:
 17
 18function listAPNRepresentatives7()
 19     n := 7;
 20     FF<p> := GF(2^n);
 21     P<x> := PolynomialRing(FF);
 22
 23     G7 := [
 24             x^3,
 25             x^5,
 26             x^9,
 27             x^13,
 28             x^57,
 29             x^63,
 30             x^3 + Trace(x^9)
 31     ];
 32
 33     return G7;
 34end function;
 35
 36.. code-block:: text
 37:linenos:
 38
 39function listAPNRepresentatives8()
 40     n := 8;
 41     FF<p> := GF(2^n);
 42     P<x> := PolynomialRing(FF);
 43
 44     G8 := [
 45             x^3,
 46             x^9,
 47             x^57,
 48             x^3 + x^17 + p^48*x^18 + p^3*x^33 + p*x^34 + x^48,
 49             x^3 + Trace(x^9),
 50             x^3 + p^(-1)*Trace(p^3*x^9),
 51             (x + x^16)^3 + p^17*(p*x + p^16*x^16)^12 + p*(x + x^16)*(p*x + p^16*x^16)
 52     ];
 53
 54     return G8;
 55end function;
 56
 57.. code-block:: text
 58:linenos:
 59
 60function listAPNRepresentatives9()
 61     n := 9;
 62     FF<p> := GF(2^n);
 63     P<x> := PolynomialRing(FF);
 64     Q := quo< P | ideal < P | x^(2^n) + x > >;
 65     Trace39 := x + x^8 + x^64;
 66     G9 := [
 67             x^3,
 68             x^5,
 69             x^17,
 70             x^13,
 71             x^241,
 72             x^19,
 73             x^255,
 74             x^3 + Trace(x^9),
 75             P ! ( Q ! (x^3 + Evaluate(Trace39, x^9 + x^18)) ),
 76             P ! ( Q ! (x^3 + Evaluate(Trace39,x^18 + x^36)) ),
 77             p^337*x^129 + p^424*x^66 + p^2*x^17 + p*x^10 + p^34*x^3
 78     ];
 79
 80     return G9;
 81end function;
 82
 83.. code-block:: text
 84:linenos:
 85
 86function listAPNRepresentatives10()
 87     n := 10;
 88     FF<p> := GF(2^n);
 89     P<x> := PolynomialRing(FF);
 90     G10 := [
 91             x^3,
 92             x^9,
 93             x^57,
 94             x^339,
 95             x^6 + x^33 + p^31*x^192,
 96             x^72 + x^33 + p^31*x^258,
 97             x^3 + Trace(x^9),
 98             x^3 + p^(-1)*Trace(p^3*x^9),
 99             x^3 + p^341 * x^9 + p^682 * x^96 + x^288,
100             x^3 + p^341 * x^129 + p^682 * x^96 + x^36
101     ];
102
103     return G10;
104end function;
105
106.. code-block:: text
107:linenos:
108
109function listAPNRepresentatives11()
110     n := 11;
111     FF<p> := GF(2^n);
112     P<x> := PolynomialRing(FF);
113     G11 := [
114             x^3,
115             x^5,
116             x^9,
117             x^17,
118             x^33,
119             x^13,
120             x^57,
121             x^241,
122             x^993,
123             x^35,
124             x^287,
125             x^1023,
126             x^3 + Trace(x^9)
127     ];
128
129     return G11;
130end function;
